name: MQTT Basics
description: Run short code safely, publish JSON telemetry, and understand the MQTT client lifecycle.

lessons.name: 30-Second MQTT Sandbox
lessons.description: Run a small MicroPython program on the ESP32 and inspect output and MQTT messages.

lessons.name: Publish One JSON Message
lessons.description: Connect to MQTT and publish one JSON telemetry message to the attempt topic.
lessons.template:
import json

client = make_mqtt_client()
topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/telemetry"

# Connect and publish one JSON message here

lessons.name: Connect, Publish, Disconnect
lessons.description: Practice the complete short MQTT lifecycle with a clean disconnect.
lessons.template:
import json

client = make_mqtt_client()
telemetry_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/telemetry"

# connect -> publish -> disconnect

name: Receiving Commands
description: Set real LED outputs, publish LED events, subscribe to commands, parse JSON, and control the LEDs.

lessons.name: Turn LEDs On and Report It
lessons.description: Turn GPIO 2 and GPIO 4 on and publish a simple LED event.
lessons.template:
import json
from machine import Pin

leds = [Pin(2, Pin.OUT), Pin(4, Pin.OUT)]
client = make_mqtt_client()
event_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/event"

# TODO: turn both LEDs on, publish the event, and disconnect

lessons.name: Turn LEDs Off and Report It
lessons.description: Turn GPIO 2 and GPIO 4 off and publish a simple LED event.
lessons.template:
import json
from machine import Pin

leds = [Pin(2, Pin.OUT), Pin(4, Pin.OUT)]
client = make_mqtt_client()
event_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/event"

# TODO: turn both LEDs off, publish the event, and disconnect

lessons.name: Minimal LEDs Command Listener
lessons.description: Subscribe to one command topic and turn both LEDs on when a message arrives.
lessons.template:
import time
from machine import Pin

leds = [Pin(2, Pin.OUT), Pin(4, Pin.OUT)]
client = make_mqtt_client()
command_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/command"

# TODO: set a callback, subscribe, and poll with check_msg()

lessons.name: Subscribe and Poll Commands
lessons.description: Subscribe to the attempt command topic and poll incoming MQTT messages for a limited time.
lessons.template:
import json
import time

client = make_mqtt_client()
command_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/command"
telemetry_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/telemetry"

# TODO: subscribe, publish command_ready, and poll with check_msg()

lessons.name: Parse a JSON Command
lessons.description: Receive one MQTT command and parse the JSON payload with json.loads().
lessons.template:
import json
import time

client = make_mqtt_client()
command_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/command"
telemetry_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/telemetry"
event_topic = ATTEMPT_TOPIC_ROOT + "/event"

# TODO: parse the incoming JSON command and publish a parsed event

lessons.name: Control the LEDs from MQTT
lessons.description: Turn the ESP32 LEDs on or off from a JSON MQTT command and publish an event.
lessons.template:
import json
import time
from machine import Pin

leds = [Pin(2, Pin.OUT), Pin(4, Pin.OUT)]
client = make_mqtt_client()

name: Small IoT Device Protocol
description: Report device state and implement a tiny LED command protocol.

lessons.name: LED State Protocol
lessons.description: Support on, off, and toggle commands and publish the final LED state.
lessons.template:

import time
from machine import Pin

leds = [Pin(2, Pin.OUT), Pin(4, Pin.OUT)]
